scope_note: QA Observer Core Cert family [159]: certifies qa_mod() A1 compliance (output always in {1,...,m}, never 0) and compute_qci() determinism. These two functions are the computational atoms of the topographic observer pipeline used across all 6 empirical domains (finance, EEG, audio, seismology, climate, ERA5). qa_mod formula: ((int(x)-1) % m) + 1. T2 compliance: no float->int feedback. Source: qa_lab/qa_observer/core.py, canonical from 46_seismic_topographic_observer.py.
